sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46941" key="h)lsa/mhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠλσάμην</orth>, <sense id="n46941.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἠλασάμην</ref></xr>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἐλαύνω</etym>) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διηλσάμην</foreign> is prob. l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
